详情: [{"type": "image", "url": "https://sg-live-01.slatic.net/p/c798a9c1536cfbae3ee36e7b03c9eb28.jpg"}, {"type": "text", "text": "Want to enjoy great sauces with your meals, while still making a healthy choice? The Rabeko Zero Sauce range gives you sauces with almost no calories. Our various sauces are delicious with dishes like fish, meat, fries and many other tasty foods. All our sugar-free options let you enjoy your favourite sauce with no worries. Meaning you can enjoy your tasty meal even more. What makes Rabeko Zero Sauce unique? Fancy making your meal even tastier – without it making you fat? Rabeko Zero Sauce is just as tasty as normal sauce, but low in calories. The sauces come in all kinds of flavours and can be enjoyed both warm and cold. Rabeko sauces are sweetened with the sweetener sucralose. This has a taste close to sugar, but without the high level of carbohydrates and sugars. What’s more, all Rabeko sauces, with the exception of Mayo, are suitable for vegans. 🏋️‍️ Your reasons for choosing Rabeko sauces There are all kinds of good reasons for choosing our healthy sauce. So we’ve lined them up for you here: Each Rabeko Zero Sauce is low in calories. All Rabeko sauces are free of fat and/or sugar. You can choose from a wide range of sauces. Are you looking for a healthy sauce to pep up a savoury or sweet dish? With our varied range of sauces you’re sure to find something that tickles your fancy. So scroll through the various Rabeko sauces and discover all the great varieties. Try Rabeko’s healthy sauce! With Rabeko’s 10 great flavours, you’re spoilt for choice. You can enjoy the great taste without worrying about fattening calories. So Rabeko Zero Sauce means eating responsibly. Order online and discover all the benefits on offer. Note: Store in a cool, dry place. Keep refrigerated after opening."}]

Our various sauces are delicious with dishes like fish, meat, fries and many other tasty foods. All our sugar-free options let you enjoy your favourite sauce with no worries. Meaning you can enjoy your tasty meal even more.

What makes Rabeko Zero Sauce unique?

Fancy making your meal even tastier – without it making you fat? Rabeko Zero Sauce is just as tasty as normal sauce, but low in calories. The sauces come in all kinds of flavours and can be enjoyed both warm and cold. Rabeko sauces are sweetened with the sweetener sucralose. This has a taste close to sugar, but without the high level of carbohydrates and sugars. What’s more, all Rabeko sauces, with the exception of Mayo, are suitable for vegans.

🏋️‍️ Your reasons for choosing Rabeko sauces

There are all kinds of good reasons for choosing our healthy sauce. So we’ve lined them up for you here:

Each Rabeko Zero Sauce is low in calories.

All Rabeko sauces are free of fat and/or sugar.

You can choose from a wide range of sauces.

Are you looking for a healthy sauce to pep up a savoury or sweet dish? With our varied range of sauces you’re sure to find something that tickles your fancy. So scroll through the various Rabeko sauces and discover all the great varieties.

Try Rabeko’s healthy sauce!

With Rabeko’s 10 great flavours, you’re spoilt for choice. You can enjoy the great taste without worrying about fattening calories. So Rabeko Zero Sauce means eating responsibly. Order online and discover all the benefits on offer.

Note: Store in a cool, dry place. Keep refrigerated after opening.

详情: [{"type": "text", "text": "The spicy and sour cold mixed sauce is a versatile compound seasoning that primarily serves to impart an acidic and spicy, appetizing flavor to dishes, significantly enhancing the overall taste of the dish. By blending various flavors such as acid, spiciness, freshness, and sweetness, it effectively stimulates the appetite and is particularly suitable for use in summer or when one has a lack of appetite. Specifically, the functions of the spicy and sour cold mixed sauce are as follows: 1. Simplifying the cooking process: For home cooking, using a pre-blended spicy and sour cold mixed sauce can eliminate the cumbersome steps of separately preparing various seasonings such as soy sauce, vinegar, sugar, and chili oil, achieving \"one sauce for the dish\", greatly enhancing the convenience of making cold mixed dishes. 2. Stabilizing flavor output: Whether it is homemade or industrially produced cold mixed sauce, its standardized formula helps ensure consistent flavor each time, avoiding the problem of inconsistent taste due to individual handling differences in dishes. 3. Wide application scenarios: It is not only the soul sauce for making various cold mixed dishes (such as pickled cucumbers, cold mixed blanched mushrooms, chicken with saliva, etc.), but can also be used as the base sauce for捞汁 small seafood， cold noodles， and even for making dipping sauces for hot pot or enhancing the flavor of steamed fish and dumplings， demonstrating strong versatility. 4. Enriching the natural flavor of ingredients： High-quality spicy and sour sauces can balance the acid and spiciness ratio. Their savory components (such as soy sauce， oyster sauce， etc.) can complement and enhance the natural freshness of the ingredients， rather than simply covering up the flavor of the ingredients. 酸辣凉拌汁是一种用途广泛的复合调味汁，其核心作用是赋予菜肴酸辣开胃的风味，并能显著提升菜品的层次感。它通过融合酸、辣、鲜、甜等多种味道，有效刺激食欲，尤其适合在夏季或食欲不振时使用。 具体而言，酸辣凉拌汁的作用主要体现在以下几个方面： 1.简化烹饪流程‌：对于家庭烹饪而言，使用调配好的酸辣凉拌汁可以省去分别准备生抽、醋、糖、辣椒油等多种调料的繁琐步骤，实现“一汁成菜”，大大提升了制作凉拌菜的便捷性。 ‌2.稳定风味输出‌：无论是家庭自制还是工业化生产的凉拌汁，其标准化的配方有助于确保每次调味的味道稳定，避免因个人手感差异导致菜品口味时咸时淡的问题。 ‌3.应用场景广泛‌：它不仅是制作各类凉拌菜（如拍黄瓜、凉拌木耳、口水鸡等）的灵魂酱汁，还可以作为捞汁小海鲜、凉面的调味底汁，甚至用于调制火锅蘸料或为蒸鱼、饺子提味，展现出很强的百搭性。 ‌4.激发食材本味‌：优质的酸辣汁能平衡酸辣比例，其鲜味成分（如酱油、蚝油等）可以衬托并提升食材本身的鲜美，而非单纯地掩盖食材味道。"}, {"type": "image", "url": "https://my-live-01.slatic.net/p/414709aec2e6b5a2de5a7a540c97706e.jpg"}, {"type": "image", "url": "https://my-live-01.slatic.net/p/77df3cb82c4197d969ca821603150077.jpg"}, {"type": "image", "url": "https://my-live-01.slatic.net/p/57552ae27feec1368c90538c5c880947.jpg"}, {"type": "image", "url": "https://my-live-01.slatic.net/p/294dd32429f10725fb6918f248417dec.jpg"}, {"type": "image", "url": "https://my-live-01.slatic.net/p/2c01e81c0ba4c4ac3a9ea78ed9eb6667.jpg"}, {"type": "image", "url": "https://my-live-01.slatic.net/p/76edb4772ce99d9c29f30e2069696c70.jpg"}, {"type": "image", "url": "https://my-live-01.slatic.net/p/5791d585a6993b8987487da18f5569b6.jpg"}, {"type": "image", "url": "https://my-live-01.slatic.net/p/e55a70a0008cacc8f63d9dc5a0f0378f.jpg"}]

The spicy and sour cold mixed sauce is a versatile compound seasoning that primarily serves to impart an acidic and spicy, appetizing flavor to dishes, significantly enhancing the overall taste of the dish. By blending various flavors such as acid, spiciness, freshness, and sweetness, it effectively stimulates the appetite and is particularly suitable for use in summer or when one has a lack of appetite.

Specifically, the functions of the spicy and sour cold mixed sauce are as follows:

1. Simplifying the cooking process: For home cooking, using a pre-blended spicy and sour cold mixed sauce can eliminate the cumbersome steps of separately preparing various seasonings such as soy sauce, vinegar, sugar, and chili oil, achieving \"one sauce for the dish\", greatly enhancing the convenience of making cold mixed dishes.

2. Stabilizing flavor output: Whether it is homemade or industrially produced cold mixed sauce, its standardized formula helps ensure consistent flavor each time, avoiding the problem of inconsistent taste due to individual handling differences in dishes.

3. Wide application scenarios: It is not only the soul sauce for making various cold mixed dishes (such as pickled cucumbers, cold mixed blanched mushrooms, chicken with saliva, etc.), but can also be used as the base sauce for捞汁 small seafood， cold noodles， and even for making dipping sauces for hot pot or enhancing the flavor of steamed fish and dumplings， demonstrating strong versatility.

4. Enriching the natural flavor of ingredients： High-quality spicy and sour sauces can balance the acid and spiciness ratio. Their savory components (such as soy sauce， oyster sauce， etc.) can complement and enhance the natural freshness of the ingredients， rather than simply covering up the flavor of the ingredients.

酸辣凉拌汁是一种用途广泛的复合调味汁，其核心作用是赋予菜肴酸辣开胃的风味，并能显著提升菜品的层次感。它通过融合酸、辣、鲜、甜等多种味道，有效刺激食欲，尤其适合在夏季或食欲不振时使用。

具体而言，酸辣凉拌汁的作用主要体现在以下几个方面：

1.简化烹饪流程‌：对于家庭烹饪而言，使用调配好的酸辣凉拌汁可以省去分别准备生抽、醋、糖、辣椒油等多种调料的繁琐步骤，实现“一汁成菜”，大大提升了制作凉拌菜的便捷性。

‌2.稳定风味输出‌：无论是家庭自制还是工业化生产的凉拌汁，其标准化的配方有助于确保每次调味的味道稳定，避免因个人手感差异导致菜品口味时咸时淡的问题。

‌3.应用场景广泛‌：它不仅是制作各类凉拌菜（如拍黄瓜、凉拌木耳、口水鸡等）的灵魂酱汁，还可以作为捞汁小海鲜、凉面的调味底汁，甚至用于调制火锅蘸料或为蒸鱼、饺子提味，展现出很强的百搭性。

‌4.激发食材本味‌：优质的酸辣汁能平衡酸辣比例，其鲜味成分（如酱油、蚝油等）可以衬托并提升食材本身的鲜美，而非单纯地掩盖食材味道。

appetizing flavor to dishes, significantly enhancing the overall taste of the dish. By blending various flavors such as acid, spiciness, freshness, and sweetness, it effectively stimulates the appetite and is particularly suitable for use in summer or when one has a lack of appetite.Specifically, the functions of the spicy and sour cold mixed sauce are as follows:1. Simplifying the cooking process: For home cooking, using a pre-blended spicy and sour cold mixed sauce can eliminate the cumbersome steps of separately preparing various seasonings such as soy sauce, vinegar, sugar, and chili oil, achieving \"one sauce for the dish\", greatly enhancing the convenience of making cold mixed dishes.2. Stabilizing flavor output: Whether it is homemade or industrially produced cold mixed sauce, its standardized formula helps ensure consistent flavor each time, avoiding the problem of inconsistent taste due to individual handling differences in dishes.3. Wide application scenarios: It is not only the soul sauce for making various cold mixed dishes (such as pickled cucumbers, cold mixed blanched mushrooms, chicken with saliva, etc.), but can also be used as the base sauce for捞汁 small seafood， cold noodles， and even for making dipping sauces for hot pot or enhancing the flavor of steamed fish and dumplings， demonstrating strong versatility.4. Enriching the natural flavor of ingredients： High-quality spicy and sour sauces can balance the acid and spiciness ratio. Their savory components (such as soy sauce， oyster sauce， etc.) can complement and enhance the natural freshness of the ingredients， rather than simply covering up the flavor of the ingredients.酸辣凉拌汁是一种用途广泛的复合调味汁，其核心作用是赋予菜肴酸辣开胃的风味，并能显著提升菜品的层次感。它通过融合酸、辣、鲜、甜等多种味道，有效刺激食欲，尤其适合在夏季或食欲不振时使用。具体而言，酸辣凉拌汁的作用主要体现在以下几个方面：1.简化烹饪流程‌：对于家庭烹饪而言，使用调配好的酸辣凉拌汁可以省去分别准备生抽、醋、糖、辣椒油等多种调料的繁琐步骤，实现“一汁成菜”，大大提升了制作凉拌菜的便捷性。‌2.稳定风味输出‌：无论是家庭自制还是工业化生产的凉拌汁，其标准化的配方有助于确保每次调味的味道稳定，避免因个人手感差异导致菜品口味时咸时淡的问题。‌3.应用场景广泛‌：它不仅是制作各类凉拌菜（如拍黄瓜、凉拌木耳、口水鸡等）的灵魂酱汁，还可以作为捞汁小海鲜、凉面的调味底汁，甚至用于调制火锅蘸料或为蒸鱼、饺子提味，展现出很强的百搭性。‌4.激发食材本味‌：优质的酸辣汁能平衡酸辣比例，其鲜味成分（如酱油、蚝油等）可以衬托并提升食材本身的鲜美，而非单纯地掩盖食材味道。", "url": "https://www.lazada.sg/products/spicy-and-sour-salad-dressing-for-removing-fat-and-flavoring-cold-noodles-with-cucumber-salad-seasoning-for-flavoring-and-seasoning-i13700557188.html", "offers": {"@type": "AggregateOffer", "availability": "https://schema.org/InStock", "url": "https://www.lazada.sg/products/spicy-and-sour-salad-dressing-for-removing-fat-and-flavoring-cold-noodles-with-cucumber-salad-seasoning-for-flavoring-and-seasoning-i13700557188.html", "seller": {"@type": "Organization", "name": ""}, "hasMerchantReturnPolicy": {"@type": "MerchantReturnPolicy", "applicableCountry": "SG", "returnPolicyCategory": "https://schema.org/MerchantReturnNotPermitted"}}}, {"@context": "https://schema.org", "@type": "BreadcrumbList", "itemListElement": []}]}

Japanese yuzu ponzu saouce

Hyoshiro YUZU NO SIZUKU


Enjoy a refreshing burst of citrus with deep umami from bonito and kelp.
This yuzu ponzu sauce delivers a clean, tangy flavor that instantly enhances any dish.

Made by Ajino Hyoshiro from Fukuoka, Japan, using traditional Japanese techniques and carefully selected citrus such as yuzu, kabosu, and sudachi.

Perfect for everyday use:
Use it as a dressing, dipping sauce, or seasoning for a wide range of dishes.

Great for:

  • Salad (light and no oil)

  • Dumplings and fried food

  • Hot pot and shabu-shabu

  • Grilled meat or fish

Features:

  • No oil, light and easy to use

  • Fresh citrus aroma with balanced sourness

  • Rich umami from bonito flakes and kelp

  • Multi-purpose Japanese seasoning

Note:
Packaging may vary.
Please use as directed.


A refreshing, No Oil and fresh Yuzu taste

Sprinkle it directly on salads, fries, or dumplings. It is also recommended as a dipping sauce for hotpots and grated daikon radish, and is also recommended for salads with an elegant citrus aroma. It can also be used for marinated, grilled, and stir-fried dishes.



Aji no Hyoshiro is

AJINO HYOSHIRO began as a small Japanese restaurant in 1900 in a rural town called Shonai-cho, Kaho-gun, Fukuoka Prefecture, but the restaurant became so popular for its taste that it was renamed AJINO HYOSHIRO and became a popular old shop for soup stock from Fukuoka.
